$schema-note: Brief 086 — bidirectional first-name equivalence pairs for hardcover-author-normalize.ts. Each [a, b] pair means a roster first-name 'a' may appear on Hardcover as 'b' AND vice-versa; the lookup is case-insensitive and emits the other side with the table's canonical casing. Seeded from common W40K-author diminutives (Dan/Daniel Abnett, Rob/Robert Sanders, Josh/Joshua Reynolds, Nick/Nicholas Kyme, …); maintainer extends forward. Keep it small — only real, observed first-name variants, not every theoretical nickname.
